description: Import the medical physics project located at '/home/ga/eclipse-workspace/RadOncPhysics' into the Eclipse workspace. Resolve all validation errors in 'beam_model.xml' to ensure compliance with the 'beam_schema.xsd' schema. The configuration must use 'Photon' for the radiation type, '600' for the reference dose rate, and include a Dmax value of '1.5' within the depth dose parameters. Format and save the file.
